data.body: EPIC 3393 CLOSED + signed. All 7 stories + epic closed+signed. Landing: first submit hit a textual conflict in generated docs/env-vars.md (origin/main advanced to b0ac25447). Rebased whole 7-commit stack onto current origin/main, resolving each commit's generated-file conflict by regenerating (env-vars.md/mcp-reference.md/server.json). Verified rebased stack: all drift gates pass, 158 auth/mcp tests pass, lint+typecheck clean. Re-pushed all 7 changes (Change-Ids preserved). Polling for fresh Verified+LLM on all 7, then will submit top (727) to land the stack atomically.
